title: Left Front Tone Wheel (Subfault)
system: シャシ / 左前輪速センサー
check_order: DTC消去前に状態、フリーズフレーム、同時DTCを保存する
車種、年式、装着ECUを確認する
サブ故障、端子番号、基準値、診断順はメーカー整備書で確認する
common_mistakes: 正式名称だけで原因部品を断定しない
safety_notes: 制動・姿勢制御に関わる系統はメーカー指定手順を優先する
confidence: 定義確認済み・診断手順未登録
source: NHTSA DOT HS 812 576 Appendix K / SAE J2012 selected DTC table

title: Left Rear-Wheel Speed Sensor Supply (Subfault)
system: Chassis / Left rear wheel speed sensor
check_order: Save DTC, freeze-frame, and concurrent DTCs before inspection.
Confirm the vehicle and reporting ECU.
Use the manufacturer service manual for subfault interpretation, terminals, values, and sequence.
common_mistakes: Do not infer the fault cause from the code name alone.
safety_notes: Brake, stability, and chassis systems require manufacturer procedures before inspection.
source: NHTSA DOT HS 812 576 Appendix K / SAE J2012 selected DTC table
